generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people worry about privacy, but have you seen what happens when we don't have the tools to stop threats fast? My cousin's town had a scare last year - local police couldn't act until federal agents arrived. We need to give our first responders the authority they need to keep us safe. #CommunityFirst #SafetyOverBureaucracy
